pundit.name: Alexi Lalas
pundit.take: **Devin, LOOK AT ME. You drafted Bosnia like you're expecting a miracle from a team that can't even spell "victory"!** Let me tell you something, Ghost Pepper. Spain's going to need all the divine intervention it can get today when they face off in Arlington, and yet, the pep in your step only gets you so far when your roster's more patchwork than purposeful. Over in East Rutherford, it's Zach's Mustard Boy Brazil against a European powerhouse that will surely remind him why Switzerland's neutrality isn't always the best strategy on the pitch. And don't think I've forgotten about you, Backpass Assassin—Gayden, even Japan feels your team's lack of vision as they face off against an as-yet-unnamed giant that will surely wipe the floor with your poor draft decisions. Gunner, you've got the lead with 42 points, but you should be embarrassed it took you this long to lord over this ragtag bunch. And Rafe, "The Noisemaker," when Germany ends up drawing against Paraguay, and you're left clutching that 5th place like a participation trophy, don't act surprised. Because if you weren't, you wouldn't have drafted teams that started on vacation and never came back! On the World Cup stage, mediocrity isn't just a label—it's a lifestyle.

pundit_takes.headline: Gunner extends lead with Morocco's draw against Netherlands
pundit_takes.subtitle: Says it's all part of his 'draw it out' strategy.

pundit_takes.headline: Rafe celebrates Germany's draw against Paraguay like a victory
pundit_takes.subtitle: Sources say he mistook 1-1 for advancement points.

pundit_takes.headline: Zach's Brazil keeps him in the running, barely
pundit_takes.subtitle: Insider claims Zach hoped for a more mustardy performance.

pundit_takes.headline: Devin remains in third place, banking on USA's potential
pundit_takes.subtitle: He insists it's all going according to his 'ghost pepper' plan.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gayden's Japan crashes out, leaving him with as much hope as a broken GPS.
Rafe drafting teams with his eyes closed was more productive than Gayden's fancy selections.
Devin being skull-crushed by Rafe twice—age is just a number, pal.
Sim prediction skills with Rafe is like trusting a compass in a minefield.
